personal.name: Darshan Satapara
personal.summary: Full-stack engineer building scalable web applications and high-volume data pipelines using React, Node.js, and Python. I create AI-powered automation, OCR systems, and LLM workflows that eliminate manual bottlenecks.
personal.about: I am a Computer Engineering student and full-stack engineer who enjoys turning complex workflows into reliable products. My work spans React and Next.js interfaces, Node.js and Python backends, high-volume database pipelines, OCR systems, and practical LLM automation. I am also a passionate podcaster and group-discussion host, bringing strong communication and a collaborative mindset to fast-paced teams.

resumes.label: Development + Data + AI
resumes.description: Full-stack development, backend engineering, data pipelines, and AI automation.

resumes.label: Data + AI Focus
resumes.description: Data engineering, OCR, LLM workflows, fine-tuning, ETL, and Python automation.

highlights: Automated PDF parsing workflows using OCR services, OpenAI, and Mistral AI, significantly reducing manual data-entry bottlenecks.
Developed a scalable client-agency platform backend using Node.js, including secure design-asset sharing through AWS S3.
Aligned technical features with client requirements during Agile sprints to support seamless cross-functional delivery.
Collaborated on Instant Dukaan, a SaaS platform enabling local retail shops to rapidly deploy online eCommerce storefronts.
Contributed to Blutec Ping and optimized backend workflows for a bulk WhatsApp messaging service.
Assisted in building Scout, a Google Maps-based lead-generation tool for automated B2B data extraction and client discovery.
Analyzed and consolidated architecture across 8-10 databases and 30+ interconnected tables containing more than 15 million records.
Created a centralized master-data table that eliminated the overhead of resource-heavy multi-join queries.
Automated business workflows with Python, including UltraMsg WhatsApp broadcasts, domain-specific news scraping, and Google review checks.
Engineered a full-stack eCommerce platform with secure Razorpay integration and robust admin-management controls.
Co-developed a MERN-stack task-management system to isolate and streamline multi-team project workflows.
Optimized responsive design and frontend performance to deliver a seamless end-to-end user experience.

projects.title: Instant Dukaan
projects.description: A scalable SaaS platform empowering local retailers to rapidly deploy customized online eCommerce storefronts. I contributed responsive frontend components, backend APIs, secure authentication, dynamic inventory, and multi-tenant merchant workflows.

projects.title: Blutec Ping
projects.description: Optimized backend workflows for a bulk WhatsApp messaging service, improving enterprise message-delivery speed. Integrated the WhatsApp API for high-volume queues and streamlined API responses and database queries.

projects.title: Scout
projects.description: A Google Maps-based B2B lead-generation tool that streamlines automated business-data extraction, prospect discovery, and client outreach workflows.

projects.title: Mahendra Ke Namkeen
projects.description: A B2C eCommerce platform with an optimized storefront and dedicated admin panel. Integrated Razorpay, secure authentication, live order management, user data, and platform analytics to support real-world revenue.

projects.title: AI-Powered OCR Pipeline
projects.description: An automated extraction pipeline that converts unstructured PDF brochures into database-ready JSON. It combines OpenAI, Mistral AI, AWS, Azure, MinerU, and Mistral OCR approaches, then syncs results to Directus and reduces manual entry by more than 80%.

projects.title: Enterprise ETL & Denormalization Pipeline
projects.description: Merged 30+ tables across 8-10 databases containing over 15 million records into a single source of truth. A Python ETL continuously synchronizes daily inserts and improved query retrieval speed by approximately 60%.

projects.title: Multi-Model Content Automation
projects.description: An automated task-handoff pipeline orchestrating Storyteller, Architect, and Editor LLM roles. The framework enforces Generative Engine Optimization and human-touch formatting while removing manual prompting bottlenecks.

projects.title: Inshorts News Scraper
projects.description: A Python automation that scrapes daily trending, domain-specific news from Inshorts and organizes it through the Google Sheets API every morning, saving the content team more than two research hours per day.

projects.title: Generative AI Fine-Tuning Pipeline
projects.description: Fine-tuned Meta Llama 3.1 8B with Unsloth and QLoRA on dual T4 GPUs. Built a data-ingestion pipeline to clean and structure a golden dataset of more than 40,000 MongoDB news articles for specialized content generation.

projects.title: X AI Automation Bot
projects.description: A Python pipeline using free-tier LLM APIs to generate context-aware content and autonomously publish scheduled posts to X, increasing posting frequency and eliminating manual social-media management.

projects.title: Task Management System
projects.description: A co-developed MERN-stack task-management system designed to isolate and streamline project workflows across multiple teams.

projects.title: Developer Portfolio
projects.description: A responsive personal portfolio presenting my development, data-engineering, and AI work through a structured, JSON-driven content system.

services.title: Full-Stack Development
services.description: Scalable React and Next.js products backed by secure Node.js APIs and well-designed databases.

services.title: AI & Automation
services.description: Practical Python, OCR, and LLM workflows that turn repetitive business processes into reliable pipelines.

services.title: Data Engineering
services.description: High-volume ETL, database consolidation, and performance work for complex operational datasets.
